description: Simple and elegant, these sandals from catwalk emphasize minimalistic class. For those who are not fans of over the top embellishments in their ethnic ensembles, this pair is the right foot-style choice. Wear this with a simple light hued churidhar for maximum impact.UpperThong style straps made of synthetic leather with a toe separatorMango shaped embellishment on the axis of the sandalErgonomically designed footbed with mild cushioning for comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with short heels for better supportshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
